violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Boxes of single serve items on the floor in the storage room and out front.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tile missing in the storage room exposing the attic.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Need test strips for sanitizer.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tile missing in the storage room exposing the attic.
